consignor.certificate_value: Forest Papper AB, Åsgatan 4, 41463, GÖTEBORG, SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value: Forest Papper AB, Åsgatan 4, 414 63, GÖTEBORG, SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Forest Papper AB' from Sweden matches exactly with invoice issuer 'Forest Papper AB' including address and VAT info after normalisation of company name and address. Land is verified as Sweden after normalization (rule 4.1.4). No conflicting parties found in invoice text.

consignee.certificate_value: BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S., IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14, IZMIR, TURKEY
consignee.invoice_value: BAREM AMB.SAN.VE TIC.A.S., IBNI MELEK OSB MAH. TOSBI YOL. 4 SOKAK NO: 14, IZMIR, TURKEY
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'BAREM AMB. SAN. VE TIC. A.S.' from Turkey matches buyer and delivery address in invoice after normalization. Land Turkey matches exactly (rule 4.2.3). Party identified in 'Buyer' and 'Delivery address' fields in invoice. No contradictory consignee found.

goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses a general goods description with explicit invoice number and date 'Invoice Date and Number : 16.01.2026 / 111459' matching invoice. Invoice description 'WHITE TESTLINER' matches general description. According to rule 4.3.5, general description with invoice reference is accepted without further text match.

quantity.motivation: Quantity 47802 KG in certificate matches invoice total quantity 47,802 after normalization of thousands separator and decimal representation. Units KG and number match effectively. No contradictory quantities found.

origin.motivation: Country of origin in certificate is Germany, fully matching explicit 'Goods origin Germany' in invoice. EU normalization rules apply, but Germany is explicitly stated in both. No conflicting origin data is present.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) are verified as matching between certificate and invoice without any contradictions or uncertainties.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
